paper_trading.description: Realistic paper trading with worst-case fees from live data

fees.description: Gas based on 131+ gwei Polygon peak. Winner tax is Polymarket's 2%. Slippage conservative 0.5%.

weather_cheap_bracket.description: Neobrother strategy - buy cheap brackets under 25¢, METAR/NOAA edge

copytrade_filtered.description: Domain specialist wallets only, research-backed entry caps

spread_arb.description: Complement arb (YES+NO<$1), negative risk on multi-outcome, contrarian bounce on mispricing

risk_management.description: No more than 2% in one position, 30% in one category, 5% daily loss limit

scaling_analysis.description: Run paper trades at each level to find minimum viable bankroll for each strategy
